programme.title: Hall & Oates
programme.sub-title: Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
programme.desc: When Daryl Hall and John Oates took to the stage at Sydney's Entertainment Centre as the iconic bass line of ‘Maneater' began to play, the fans knew they were in for a treat. This duo may have been opening concerts with that irresistibly smooth number for years, but it never seems to lose its magic, and the crowd – an eclectic mix of teens and baby boomers alike – lapped it up. Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, and although Oates no longer sports his signature ‘tache, they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Earworms like ‘I Can't Go For That', ‘Out Of Touch' and ‘Kiss On My List' were surefire reminders that these guys are absolute hit machines, and their catchy synth-soul classics probably deserve to permeate the airwaves as much today as they did decades ago. These Philly crooners still have it in bucket-loads, so this show should have everyone from diehard Daryl Hall and John Oates fans to kids of the 80's groovin' along in no time.

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Frontera: las rutas de la crisis
programme.desc: Una avalancha de inmigrantes abarrota la frontera y pone a prueba la capacidad del gobierno para manejar una nueva crisis humanitaria, la tensión entre ciudades fronterizas crece.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Alrededor de 50 jóvenes de un mismo vecindario recibieron acusaciones de homicidios que los marcaron para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Edición especial supremacistas: Las redes del odio
programme.desc: Se muestran a los nuevos supremacistas y se analiza la manera en la que utilizan los medios sociales para atraer a nuevos miembros.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Noticias Univision 24-7: Fin de semana
programme.desc: Las noticias más importantes del día y los temas de interés para la audiencia hispana en los EE. UU.

programme.title: Noticias Univision 24-7: Fin de semana

programme.title: El gordo y la flaca
programme.desc: Lili Estefan "La Flaca" sobrina del reconocido productor musical Emilio Estefan y Raúl de Molina "El Gordo", son los encargados de presentar de forma amena y divertida los acontecimientos de las estrellas que están haciendo noticia, en este programa de noticias del entretenimiento, además se incluyen entrevistas ligeras con artistas de la música, del cine, la televisión, el teatro y la televisión, así como famosos del deporte entre otros. Durante el transcurso de los años se han rebelado escándalos y algunas veces las estrellas han estado dispuestas a hablar y a decirlo todo ante las cámaras del programa.

programme.title: ¡Despierta América!

Este show que se ha transmitido y ha alegrado a su audiencia por más de una década, es ligero, ameno y divertido, ha mantenido al público informado de una forma jovial y casual.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Living Room (Vern Yip) + Dining Room (Chenault James)
programme.desc: Vern Yip creates a stunning foyer and a living room that's practically indestructible. Meanwhile, Kentucky designer Chenault James was determined to change that dialogue for our Whole Home Concept House. Her ace in the hole: commissioning her husband, Ed James of Four Boards Woodworking, to craft a shape-shifting table with three distinct uses.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Music Room (Monet Masters of Forbes + Masters) + Back Porch (Barclay Butera)
programme.desc: With the overwhelming task of taking on the music room in Nashville, the capital of live music, Monet Masters jumped right in without hesitation—and soon decided the best way to make a statement was to skip the traditional lounge aesthetic (dark and moody) in favor of a light, bright space with serious flavor. To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Master Bedroom (Jackson Paige) + Kids' Rooms (Amy Berry)
programme.desc: Designer Kristine Paige Kamenstein, of Jackson Paige Interiors, thinks it should be both and focused on this when creating her space within the house. Also, Dallas-​based designer Amy Berry had this in mind when she wrapped the boy's room in a mural of the Virginia countryside, and the girl's in a French blue toile.

Lauren Moore of the design trio Modern Remains built a platform in the back of the media room to showcase multiple shelving units that could hold art, books, and collectibles.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Nashville kitchen and bath designer Richard Anuszkiewicz was determined to take a narrow passageway between the master bedroom and closet and turn it into a retreat. “Everything in this bath is light and bright, so it immediately feels relaxing,” he says. Kitchen-and-bath expert Matthew Quinn starts with what's practical. “I obsess over saving people time—because time equals luxury,” he says. “In this kitchen, I focused on saving steps: from the garage to the fridge, from the dishwasher to the cabinet. It all adds up.”

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

In her kitchen, those eggs are an inspiration for a Oaxacan-themed breakfast.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E06
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover where Australia begins by embarking down the Mulgrave River on an exclusive day tour out to the Frankland Islands. Next, we explore a bit of cultural history by spearfishing alongside the Daintree Rainforest. Then we go full eco-touristic while visiting a revered sanctuary of wildlife, Hartley's Crocodile Adventure! Ultimately, we arrive at Fitzroy Island Retreat. Enough said!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, we pursue the spirit of ambition while discovering Hawaii's immortal culture! From walking the hallowed grounds of Hilo Coffee Mill to witnessing the reinvention of traditions at Old Lahaina Luau- this episode represents the best of what is to be expected while traveling wide-eyed through paradise!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E08
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit The Island of Hawaii better known as “The Big Island.” Here, we explore the history and geography of the islands, learn how to Hula Dance, visit a tranquil secluded retreat, learn the art of lei-making, and have some sea and land adventures!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E09
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the taste of pacific cuisine. From Hawaiian fusion and the beloved coffee bean to New Zealand oysters and tropical fish, Didiayer shares a variety of tastes around the pacific rim.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E10
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore culture old and new through a variety of unique destinations. Whether it be doing the Haka with a Maori tribe, weaving alpaca hair, or getting the real story behind the Hawaiian Luau, this episode dives in to the customs that bring people together.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E11
programme.desc: In this episode, we step out and in to nature to explore what adventure awaits. Amongst rappelling, zip-lining, horseback riding, snorkeling with dolphins and feeding crocodiles there is hardly a moment to catch your breath!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E12
programme.desc: In this episode, we share some of the best places from our journey where we chose to rest our heads. High-class or just like home, these lovely accommodations are sure to fit anyone's budget and style.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E13
programme.desc: In this episode, we revisit this season's best moments in art, cuisine, culture, and adventure. These are cherished memories we hope will inspire you to head out and find your wanderlust.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: Doomsday Prep
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Sugardaddy Shakedown
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose. Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they can't comprehend. Will Sonia finally reveal what's happening, or will carrying her brother's burden get the best of her?

programme.title: The New Boss
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother?? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from of yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun.? Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Bullseye!
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. But with Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule of repo.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car. And finally, Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Torn Between Two Lovers
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife.

programme.title: Surrender My Lover...Or Else!
programme.desc: Jessica says she's been fighting for her man for two years.

programme.title: Brawling Over Babes!
programme.desc: Jackie is here to confront her sister, Rachael, for stealing her husband!

programme.title: Laqueoia Redmond vs. Raymont Redmond
programme.desc: Koya supports Ray's dreams of being a rap star and a sex symbol, but it's taking a toll on their marriage. They've been together for 7 years, but Ray's excess spending in pursuit of his career are too much for Koya.

programme.title: Angela Oladiji vs. Jonathan Gilkes
programme.desc: Angela and Jonathan hide things from each other and there's been infidelity.

programme.title: Kevin Scott vs. Shae Cannon, Part 1
programme.desc: Kevin and Shae's relationship got off to a rocky start eight years ago. After a big breakup, they got back together and got married. Shae says Kevin has repeatedly cheated on her, now with a baby in the picture, things have gone from bad to worse.

programme.title: Kevin Scott vs. Shae Cannon, Part 2
programme.desc: Kevin and Shae are having a tough time raising their baby together and their rocky relationship has been plagued by cheating and fighting. Are they better parents apart?

programme.title: Jennifer Hopkins vs. Joseph Holman
programme.desc: Jennifer used to be Joe's bartender, now they're a couple. Jennifer says she witnessed the bevy of busty women Joe dated and flirted with at the bar and is worried she's not his type.

programme.title: Pascha Nixon vs. Cornelius Jenkins
programme.desc: This couple has cancelled their wedding due to cheating. Pascha says she can't trust Cornelius because he hasn't been faithful. Cornelius says he never cheated on Pascha while they were together and wants to rebuild their broken relationship.

programme.title: Shadeiah Henderson vs. Christopher Perriman
programme.desc: Shadeiah is paranoid about her relationship with Chris. She says Chris' lies and anger are taking a toll on her emotional health. Chris blames Shadeiah's non-stop nagging and mistrust for his behavior.

programme.title: Lakin Krein vs. CJ Ryan
programme.desc: Lakin has a 5 year plan for her life, but CJ may not be a part of it. CJ has struggled with drugs in the past and also did time in prison, making it hard for him to find work. Lakin says CJ has a great heart, but isn't sure love is enough to overcome all of the obstacles.

programme.title: Myesha Heredia vs. Robert Hilton
programme.desc: Myesha has been Robert's girlfriend for 6 years, now she's ready to be his wife. Robert says, “If it ain't broke don't fix it.” Plus, he doesn't like Myesha always venting about their problems on social media and flirting with other men.

programme.title: Teriana Hoskins-Brown vs Michelle Brown
programme.desc: It's been a tumultuous two years since Michelle and Teri got married. Michelle says Teri runs to other women every time they get into a fight and has cheated on her in the past. Teri claims she's being faithful and wants this relationship to work.

programme.title: Calvin Guy vs Nicole Guy
programme.desc: Calvin says Nicole acts more like a roommate than his wife. Nicole says Calvin's controlling ways are pushing her into other guys' arms. They've split up several times throughout their marriage.

programme.title: Terri Sikorski vs Alphonso Dunbar
programme.desc: Terri and Alphonso had an instant connection when they met online, now jealousy is ripping them apart. Terri says Alphonso won't let her have any male friends and she's over it! Alphonso says Terri broke a promise to him not to talk to other men and she can't be trusted.

programme.title: Albriana Turner vs. Arthur Washington
programme.desc: A love of sports brought Albriana and Arthur together, but after a move to Las Vegas their relationship is crumbling. Albriana says Arthur got a job at a casino and started gambling. Now they can't pay their rent and bills and she's having second thoughts about getting married.

programme.title: Kurt Wood vs. Latrice Wood
programme.desc: Cheating allegations are taking a toll on Latrice and Kurt's marriage of 7 years. Kurt is twice-divorced and says he knows when a spouse is being unfaithful. Latrice says she only sleeps with men in front of Kurt, because he likes it.

programme.title: Christopher Cote vs. Brittany Ewing
programme.desc: Brittany and Chris haven't been together long, but they're already dealing with serious problems. Brittany claims Chris is a compulsive liar. Chris says Brittany is too secretive.

programme.title: Tavarshia Jones vs Joshua Coleman
programme.desc: Tavarshia and Joshua's differences are keeping them from saying “I Do” after more than six years together and two kids. Tavarshia says Joshua is set in his ways. Joshua says it's Tavarshia's attitude that's the problem.

programme.title: Theresa Hunter vs. Kevin Hunter
programme.desc: It's been months since Theresa and Kevin's wedding, but they still haven't consummated their marriage. Theresa is fed up with waiting on Kevin to get things going in the bedroom and she's not sure she wants to stick around much longer.

Here's why | Helen Fisher 4) The myth of the moon goddess | Cynthia Fay Davis

programme.title: What in the World?
programme.desc: Perspective-shifting ideas on how to see life on Earth. 1) Can you freeze your body and come back to life? | Shannon N. Tessier 2) How exactly does binary code work? - José Américo N L F Freitas 3) What is Zeno's Dichotomy Paradox? - Colm Kelleher 4) How big is a mole? (Not the animal, the other one.) - Daniel Dulek 5) What on Earth is spin? - Brian Jones 6) If superpowers were real: Invisibility - Joy Lin 7) Is light a particle or a wave? - Colm Kelleher 8) How folding paper can get you to the moon - Adrian Paenza 9) Is there a center of the universe? - Marjee Chmiel and Trevor Owens 10) One is one ... or is it? - Christopher Danielson 11) How simple ideas lead to scientific discoveries - Adam Savage 12) Free falling in outer space - Matt J. Carlson

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) How do you know what's true? | Sheila Marie Orfano 2) The link between inequality and anxiety | Richard Wilkinson 3) How climate change affects your mental health | Britt Wray 4) When do kids start to care about other people's opinions? | Sara Valencia Botto 5) Should you trust unanimous decisions? - Derek Abbott 6) Why our screens make us less happy | Adam Alter 7) 3 lessons on decision-making from a poker champion | Liv Boeree

programme.title: Lead the Way
programme.desc: What makes a great leader? Surprising, nuanced approaches on how to inspire and empower others to do their very best. 1) Why great leaders take humor seriously | Jennifer Aaker and Naomi Bagdonas 2) We need leaders who boldly champion inclusion | June Sarpong 3) The breathtaking courage of Harriet Tubman - Janell Hobson 4) Great leadership is a network, not a hierarchy | Gitte Frederiksen 5) How great leaders innovate responsibly | Ken Chenault

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas
programme.desc: New, fresh ideas straight from the brightest minds of our time. 1) My epic journey becoming the fastest person to paddle around Australia | Bonnie Hancock 2) How to choose clothes for longevity, not the landfill | Diarra Bousso 3) How to prevent political corruption | Stephanie Honchell Smith 4) Can we hack photosynthesis to feed the world? | Steve Long 5) Does math have a major flaw? | Jacqueline Doan and Alex Kazachek 6) An election redesign to restore trust in US democracy | Tiana Epps-Johnson

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Shifting Winds
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Hurricane Havoc
programme.desc: They aren't strangers to nature's extremes, but Hurricanes Harvey and Irma give Stormhunters Mark Robinson and Jaclyn Whittal a run for their money, as the costliest and deadliest tropical storms batter the US south east.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
programme.desc: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course! And over the next half hour, we're bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera! From the hailstorms that destory windows to the breathtaking tornados, we've got it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge
programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention. From terrifying twisters to radical rain, we've got it all....and over the next half hour, you'll see 25 of the most insane weather ever caught on camera. Get comfortable, because you're about to experience Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood
programme.desc: Floods give way to rainbows and tornadoes twist into hailstorms on todays intense Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Timber!
programme.desc: Things are heating up with sweltering heat waves, then cooling back down with icy blizzards on todays Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
programme.desc: Todays forecast: thunder, lightning, and high winds. Oh, and lots of tornadoes.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW. A vicious hallway attack changes the course of the Tag Team division. And a new competitor from the toxic underground makes her WOW debut. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW. A vicious hallway attack changes the course of the Tag Team division. And a new competitor from the toxic underground makes her WOW debut.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight's Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit. The Beast puts her WOW World Championship on the line by announcing an open challenge to the entire WOW roster. And Stephy Slays seeks retribution against the aggressor of her tag team partner Keta Rush's brutal attack.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self proclaimed “Grits N Glam” duo Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold. The Beast gets more than she bargained for while defending her title against The Temptress. Tensions rise between The Fabulous Lana Star and her prodigy The Lioness. And the WOW World Championship Titles are on the line as a newly formed dynamic team takes their shot at the champs, Fire and Adrenaline.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast, but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez, creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target. The Disciplinarian and Samantha Smart aim to take away the sunshine from new WOW competitor, Cali Ray. The relationship between Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal is tested. And The Psycho Sisters, Razor and Fury accompanied by Mezmeriah continue down their unpredictable path of destruction towards the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Tonight has “feud” written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star's past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana's past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail? Tessa Blanchard's shocking disqualification from last week's battle with Venomous costs her much desired championship rematch against The Beast. The Dixie Darlings make a peace offering to Jessie Jones. And Stephy Slays bravely takes up for her friend against The Temptress and The Dagger who attacked Keta Rush in the alley.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week's attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles. The events between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side: Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie have been escalating for weeks. Fury and Mezmeriah take to the ring to defend Razor after Siren set fire to her face in an unsanctioned brawl. And an unexpected competitor wants to join The Psycho Sisters.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile's reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister's leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week. WOW veteran Spike joins forces to help even the odds against Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie. The Lioness returns to the ring for the first time since suffering humiliation and betrayal at the hands of Lana Star and Team Blondage. Former WOW World Champion, Tessa Blanchard is hungrier than ever for her shot at The Beast, but she must first claim victory in tonight's Number One Contender match against a treacherous competitor.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Living Creatures S1E4: Feathered Friends — Celebrate the natural beauty and diversity of birds. Explore their symbolism and captivating nature. From the elegance of birds in flight to the intricacies of their plumage, each artwork immerses viewers in the world of these winged creatures.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Young At Heart S1E2: Back to School — Showcasing a delightful array of imaginative and playful depictions, each artwork invites you into a realm of enchantment and wonder. The whimsical and fantastical elements are bound to delight, captivate, and inspire art enthusiasts of all ages.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Man Cave S1E1 — Electrifying art redefines the modern man's sanctuary. Bold and inspiring pieces radiate strength, courage, and vitality, transforming the space with elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Living Creatures S1E2: Derby Dreams — Inspired by the Kentucky Derby, one of the most iconic horse races in the world, this collection is a celebration of the beauty, strength, and speed of these magnificent animals.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E2 — Symbolizing hope and solidarity, the artworks serve as a beacon of hope, encouraging viewers to stand together in unity. Uplifting melodies guide us through pop, funk, and disco-infused soft house.

programme.title: Summer Fun II
programme.desc: Summer Fun S1E2: Sizzling, relaxing visuals for the warmest seaon of the year.

programme.title: Man Cave: Mech Marvels
programme.desc: Man Cave S1E2: Mech Marvels Where the beauty of modern engineering takes center stage and captures the essence of speed, innovation, and timeless design. Elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop create a mid to down tempo flow perfect for those looking to relax in style.
